zh.Dudzele, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau de Gavre於1405年出生在法國時，她的父親Baron Arnould de Gavre VI39歲，母親Isabelle van Gistel37歲。她於1419年與Oudard de Blondel de Joigny結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Dudzele, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau de Gavre于1405年出生在法国时，她的父亲Baron Arnould de Gavre VI39岁，母亲Isabelle van Gistel37岁。她于1419年与Oudard de Blondel de Joigny结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau de Gavre was born in 1405, in France, her father, Baron Arnould de Gavre VI, was 39 and her mother, Isabelle van Gistel, was 37. She married Oudard de Blondel de Joigny in 1419. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau de Gavre est née en 1405, à France, son père, Baron Arnould de Gavre VI, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabelle van Gistel, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Oudard de Blondel de Joigny en 1419. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau de Gavre 1405 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron Arnould de Gavre VI 39 und ihre Mutter Isabelle van Gistel 37. Sie hat 1419 Oudard de Blondel de Joigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Gavre è nata il nel 1405 nel Francia, sua padre, Baron Arnould de Gavre VI, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabelle van Gistel, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Oudard de Blondel de Joigny nel 1419. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.Dudzele, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンダドズエル
ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Gavreが1405年にフランスで生まれた時，父Baron Arnould de Gavre VIは39歳，母Isabelle van Gistelは37歳であった。1419年にOudard de Blondel de Joignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Gavre(이)가 1405년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron Arnould de Gavre VI(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle van Gistel(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1419년 Oudard de Blondel de Joigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Gavre nasceu em 1405, em França, seu pai, Baron Arnould de Gavre VI, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle van Gistel, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Oudard de Blondel de Joigny em 1419. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau de Gavre родилась в 1405 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Baron Arnould de Gavre VI было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle van Gistel, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Oudard de Blondel de Joigny в 1419 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabeau de Gavre nació en 1405, en Francia, su papá, Baron Arnould de Gavre VI, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabelle van Gistel, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Oudard de Blondel de Joigny en 1419. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
